name: vibecanvas
description: Run your agents in an infinite canvas

scripts.test: bun --filter @vibecanvas/core test && bun --filter @vibecanvas/server test && bun --filter @vibecanvas/canvas test
scripts.test:ci:docker: docker run --rm -it --platform linux/amd64 -v "$PWD":/repo -w /repo ubuntu:24.04 bash -lc 'export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive && apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl unzip git ca-certificates && curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash && export BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun && export PATH=$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH && bun --version && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run test'
scripts.server:dev: cd apps/server && bun run --watch src/main.ts serve
scripts.server:prod: NODE_ENV=production cd apps/server && bun run --watch src/main.ts serve --port 7496
